title: A Giants reunion: Odell Beckham Jr. returns to NY to bolster WR room
contentHtml: Wide receiver Odell Beckham Jr. is reuniting with the team that drafted him more than a decade ago, signing a one-year contract with the New York Giants, the team announced Monday. The 33-year-old worked out for the Giants on Monday morning alongside a handful of veteran receivers that included JuJu Smith-Schuster, Braxton Berrios and Anthony Miller. It turned out to be a fruitful workout, because along with Beckham, the Giants also signed Smith-Schuster and Berrios to one-year deals, the team announced. The three of them will help bolster a wide receiver group that has been beset by injuries,...
